backlog.title: build PR template check for this repo
backlog.description: Hedl ships check_pr_template.py as a static placeholder that validates Hedl's own section schema. This item replaces it with a repo-specific version derived from the actual .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md. Implementation: read .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md, extract every '## Heading' section, generate .github/scripts/check_pr_template.py that validates a PR body has each section filled with non-placeholder content. The generated script uses the same is_placeholder / section_content pattern as the static version. Commit the result. The gate's template check skips until this file exists.
acceptance_criteria: .github/scripts/check_pr_template.py exists and validates the sections present in .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md.
am_i_done.py --pr N template check runs (no longer skips) after this item.
